title: ornithogalum neurostegium subsp. neurostegium
intro: Ornithogalum neurostegium subsp. neurostegium, also known as the 'Dog-tooth Violet', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health conditions, including wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, and has been found to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of Ornithogalum neurostegium subsp. neurostegium are typically made by infusing the plant's roots or leaves in water, and can be consumed as a tea or applied topically as a paste.
